subject: Add correlationId to ServiceInstancesRequest
commit_message:

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Looks good.

Patch Set 2:

I like the fix , but a little issue is the timing of the fix. This fix needs to be tested properly as this is the core of the functionality now and any disruption it might bring in at this moment would be very hazardous for ONAP :). Please ensure you have tested it and confirm.

Patch Set 2:

Hi Seshu, I understand your concerns. I know it touches the key part of the code, however my changes are related to:
1. create wrapper for parameters to rest client - RequestClientParamater. It wraps parameters in CamundaClient into one object. Now, we pass one wrapper object instead of many parameters. It is cleaner.
2. Add to this wrapper one parameter more - correlationId, so we are able now to pass it to camunda process.

As you can see, the changes are not complicated and all covered with junit tests, I checked it. For me, junit for this kind of changes are enough. Of course we want to test it all in practice, in open lab. We are working on it.

Patch Set 2:

Thanks for the prompt reply, I did understand the fix and as I said I like it, its only the tie critical that made me rethink of merging. Unfourtunately our UTs are not yet mature enough to completely rely on them. Please have one test atleast at the open lab and I shall get this merged.

Short question:
What would be the process to test this change in the OpenLAB environment, without code approved in the official repo?
Is there any local build possible to be introduced in OpenLAB?

So far, as Lukasz wrote, the change was tested on our local environment, not sure, if we can introduce this change in OpenLAB, without having this change approved in the ONAP public repo...

Patch Set 2:

Hi Damian, We cant get it in the intel open lab, I was talking of a local lab test with postman. 
If you have already done that I will merge the change NP :)

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Given where we are in the release lifecycle, how is this change helping in addressing the 24 High and Highest priority ONAP defects backlog? I think at this time this code submission is too risky, we should keep our focus on integration testing related to S3P and Usecases.

Patch Set 2:

> Hi Damian, We cant get it in the intel open lab, I was talking of a
 > local lab test with postman.
 > If you have already done that I will merge the change NP :)

Hi Seshu, I have tested it locally. I built run so docker container, then I sent rest request to ServiceInstance class. The rest url was:
http://localhost:8080/ecomp/mso/infra/serviceInstances/v4/ 
of coruse with the proper body where correlationId was included. I put the logs in the code that shows if correlationId is properly handled by the data flow. The test is successful. I got the success response, and my added logs shows that CamundaClient class run post method with the properly set correlationId. This correlationId is properly put to entity of post request. 
I have the docker logs from this test and I can send you if you want.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

merging for now, will need to revert if this fails
Change has been successfully merged by Seshu Kumar M
